one_liner: AI academic research search engine with enterprise-only API access requiring sales contact; MCP server already exists for the research tool.

auth_methods.notes: GoConsensus API uses API Key + API Secret passed in request body along with user_email, source_name. Keys generated in Integrations section of account. Research search API (consensus.app) uses x-api-key header.
OAuth 2.0 used for specific integrations like Salesforce connection (v11.10+). Also mentioned for Consensus AI Connect MCP server.

self_serve_notes: No free tier or self-serve developer API access for Consensus.app research API - restricted to enterprise accounts only. Must contact Consensus directly to request API key. GoConsensus API credentials can be self-generated within account (Integrations section), but unclear if this requires paid account.

api_surface.notes: Consensus offers two distinct APIs: (1) GoConsensus (app.goconsensus.com) - a demo/sales automation platform with endpoints for reports, user management, and DemoBoard data; (2) Consensus.app - an AI academic research search API (v1/quick_search endpoint). The evidence primarily covers GoConsensus API which has narrow scope focused on reporting/user management. The research search API appears limited to search queries.

main_blocker: API access requires enterprise account and direct contact with Consensus for the research search API (consensus.app). While an MCP server already exists, building custom integrations requires partnership/sales contact rather than self-serve access.

evidence.supports: API Key + Secret authentication method for GoConsensus API, REST endpoints for reports/user management
API credentials can be generated in Integrations section of GoConsensus account
Research search API (v1) uses x-api-key header authentication
Official Consensus MCP server exists for research tool
No free tier available for API access; enterprise accounts must contact Consensus directly for API key
